summary.text:
Restricts a message component to the user who created the original interaction.

If the original interaction author cannot be detected, the middleware continues
with an
`ignore`
status so other middleware or the handler can decide what to do.
Creates an author-only component middleware.
Static Discord message sent when a different user tries to use the component.
The name of the middleware.

summary.text: The component context.

Restricts a command handler to interactions where the bot has every required Discord permission.

When the bot is missing permissions, the middleware cancels the handler and
sends the configured message callback instead of continuing.

Creates a bot permission guard for command handlers.

Duplicate permissions are ignored. The message callback receives both the
full required permission list and the permissions missing from the bot.
Discord permissions required by the bot to continue the command handler.
Callback called when the bot is missing permissions. It receives
CommandBotPermissionMiddlewareMessageOptions
and returns the Discord message to send.
The name of the middleware.

summary.text: The command context.

Restricts a command handler to a fixed list of Discord user IDs.

Users outside the allowlist receive the configured message and the command
middleware chain is cancelled.

Creates a command allowlist middleware.

User IDs are trimmed and empty values are ignored before the allowlist is stored.
Discord user IDs allowed to run the command.
Static Discord message sent when the current user is not in the allowlist.
The name of the middleware.

summary.text: The component context.

Restricts a component handler to members that have every required Discord permission.

When the member is missing permissions, the middleware cancels the handler and
sends the configured message callback instead of continuing.

Creates a permission guard for component handlers.

Duplicate permissions are ignored. The message callback receives both the
full required permission list and the permissions missing from the current member.
Discord permissions required to continue the component handler.
Callback called when the current member is missing permissions. It receives
ComponentMemberPermissionMiddlewareMessageOptions
and returns the Discord message to send.
The name of the middleware.

summary.text: The component context.

Prevents a user from running a command again before a configured cooldown expires.

Cooldowns are tracked per user ID. When a user is still on cooldown, the
middleware cancels the command and sends the configured message callback.
Creates a command cooldown middleware.
Cooldown duration in seconds.
Callback called when the command is still on cooldown. It receives
CooldownMessageOptions
and returns the Discord message to send.
Cleanup interval in seconds, or
`false`
to disable automatic cleanup.
The name of the middleware.

User who triggered the command.

Message configuration used by middleware.

Without callback options, this is a static Discord message object. With
callback options, this is a function that receives middleware-specific data
and returns the Discord message object to send.
The Arcscord context that triggered the middleware.
Detected i18next language for this interaction.
Fixed translation function for the detected interaction locale.

readme.text:
# @arcscord/middleware

[![npm version](https://badge.fury.io/js/@arcscord%2Fmiddleware.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@arcscord/middleware)
[![Discord](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1012097557532528791/widget.png?style=shield)](https://discord.gg/4geBanVWGR)

Ready-to-use middleware for [arcscord](https://www.npmjs.com/package/arcscord) command and component handlers.

Provides guards for cooldowns, user allowlists, component author checks, and Discord permissions.

## Install
